name: Proton VPN
description: Privacy-focused VPN service developed by Proton AG, offering encrypted tunneling with a no-logs policy and Secure Core architecture.

years.notes: Pre-2022 ProtonVPN (single word) mark. Triangle symbol with three nodes representing Iceland, Sweden, and Switzerland Secure Core countries. Brand green #5FB364 from site theme-color; SVG fill is neutral grey (mask-icon variant). Color.svg uses brand green #5FB364 per brand color; shape verified pixel-perfect against reference.
Post-2022 rebrand. Proton VPN renamed (two words). Updated shield/triangle mark. Official brand color #66DEB1 from proton.me/media/kit via simple-icons.
